name: Lemon Grove Pawn Brokers
description_short: Lemon Grove Pawn Brokers offers collateral-based lending at their Broadway location in Lemon Grove, CA, providing quick access to cash by pawning items.
description_long:
Lemon Grove Pawn Brokers operates a traditional pawn shop located at 7771 Broadway in Lemon Grove, California. The business provides collateral-based lending services, a common alternative financial service in underserved communities seeking quick access to cash without credit checks. As a pawn broker, the company accepts personal items of value as collateral in exchange for short-term loans.

While the Waze listing confirms the shop's existence, address, phone number, and operating hours, the available website content does not detail their specific loan terms, interest rates, item categories accepted, or loan duration policies. Pawn shops typically accept jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, sporting goods, and other valuables, but specific details about Lemon Grove Pawn Brokers' inventory or specialty items are not provided in the sourced material.

The business maintains consistent weekday hours (10:00 AM–5:30 PM Monday–Friday) and reduced Saturday hours (10:00 AM–4:00 PM), suggesting a standard retail pawn operation. Their direct phone line (619) 465-2960 and website (lemongrovepawnshop.com) are available for customer inquiries. The location serves the Lemon Grove area in San Diego County, which has moderate-to-lower median income demographics where pawn services are frequently utilized.

Consumers considering this option should be aware that pawn loans require surrendering physical possessions and involve redemption deadlines and potential loss of collateral. While pawn lending is faster than traditional credit and requires no credit check, it is a secured short-term solution rather than a long-term credit-building mechanism. Comparison shopping on rates and terms across local pawn brokers is recommended.
pros: No credit check required—instant qualification based on item value
Fast cash access—typical same-day or next-day funding for collateral-based loans
Established local business with direct phone line for customer service
Consistent operating hours including Saturday availability for working adults
Transparent location and contactable via both phone and website
Low barrier to entry compared to traditional personal loans
cons: Limited information available about specific loan terms, rates, or duration policies from website
Risk of losing personal items if loan cannot be repaid by redemption deadline
Pawn loans are short-term solutions and do not build credit history
Reduced Saturday hours (closes at 4:00 PM) may not accommodate all schedules
No details provided about accepted item categories or minimum/maximum loan amounts
best_for: Consumers needing emergency cash with no credit check or credit history
Individuals with valuable items they are willing to use as collateral for short-term loans
People in Lemon Grove and surrounding San Diego County areas seeking immediate local access to funds
diagnosis: Lemon Grove Pawn Brokers is best suited for borrowers who need immediate cash and have valuable items to pledge as collateral, with no access to traditional credit. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are high-risk transactions where failure to repay results in permanent loss of the pledged item, and they provide no credit-building benefit.
